en: These are the sons of Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Zebulun,
zh: 以色列的兒子是：流本、西緬、利未、猶大、以薩迦、西布倫、

en: Dan, Joseph, Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
zh: 但、約瑟、便雅憫、拿弗他利、迦得和亞設。

en: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan and Shelah; these three Bath-shua the Canaanite bore to him. Now Er, Judah's firstborn, was evil in the sight of the LORD, and he put him to death.
zh: 猶大的兒子是珥、俄南和示拉。這三人是迦南人書亞的女兒所生的。猶大的長子珥行耶和華看為惡的事，耶和華就使他死去。

en: His daughter-in-law Tamar also bore him Perez and Zerah. Judah had five sons in all.
zh: 猶大的媳婦他瑪，給猶大生了法勒斯和謝拉。猶大共有五個兒子。

en: The sons of Perez: Hezron and Hamul.
zh: 法勒斯的兒子是希斯崙和哈母勒。

en: The sons of Zerah: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Calcol, and Dara, five in all.
zh: 謝拉的兒子是心利、以探、希幔、甲各和大拉，共五人。

en: The son of Carmi: Achan, the troubler of Israel, who broke faith in the matter of the devoted thing;
zh: 迦米的兒子是亞干；這亞干偷取了當毀滅之物，連累了以色列人。

en: and Ethan's son was Azariah.
zh: 以探的兒子是亞撒利雅。

en: The sons of Hezron that were born to him: Jerahmeel, Ram, and Chelubai.
zh: 希斯崙所生的兒子是耶拉篾、蘭和基路拜。

en: Ram fathered Amminadab, and Amminadab fathered Nahshon, prince of the sons of Judah.
zh: 蘭生亞米拿達；亞米拿達生拿順；拿順是猶大人的領袖。

en: Nahshon fathered Salmon, Salmon fathered Boaz,
zh: 拿順生撒門；撒門生波阿斯。

en: Boaz fathered Obed, Obed fathered Jesse.
zh: 波阿斯生俄備得；俄備得生耶西。

en: Jesse fathered Eliab his firstborn, Abinadab the second, Shimea the third,
zh: 耶西生長子以利押、次子亞比拿達、三子示米亞、

en: Nethanel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
zh: 四子拿坦業、五子代拉、

en: Ozem the sixth, David the seventh.
zh: 六子阿鮮、七子大衛。

en: And their sisters were Zeruiah and Abigail. The sons of Zeruiah: Abishai, Joab, and Asahel, three.
zh: 他們的姊妹是洗魯雅和亞比該。洗魯雅的兒子是亞比篩、約押和亞撒黑，共三人。

en: Abigail bore Amasa, and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmaelite.
zh: 亞比該生亞瑪撒；亞瑪撒的父親是以實瑪利人益帖。

en: Caleb the son of Hezron fathered children by his wife Azubah, and by Jerioth; and these were her sons: Jesher, Shobab, and Ardon.
zh: 希斯崙的兒子迦勒與妻子阿蘇巴生了兒子，也和耶略生了兒子；她的兒子是耶設、朔罷和押墩。

en: When Azubah died, Caleb married Ephrath, who bore him Hur.
zh: 阿蘇巴死了，迦勒又娶以法他；以法他給他生了戶珥。

en: Hur fathered Uri, and Uri fathered Bezalel.
zh: 戶珥生烏利；烏利生比撒列。

en: Afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was sixty years old, and she bore him Segub.
zh: 後來希斯崙在六十歲的時候，娶了基列的父親瑪吉的女兒，與她同房，她就給他生了西割。

en: And Segub fathered Jair, who had twenty-three cities in the land of Gilead.
zh: 西割生睚珥；睚珥在基列地有二十三座城。

en: But Geshur and Aram took from them Havvoth-jair, Kenath, and its villages, sixty towns. All these were descendants of Machir, the father of Gilead.
zh: 基述人和亞蘭人卻從他們那裡奪取了睚珥的村鎮，以及基納和基納的村莊，共六十座城。以上這些人都是基列的父親瑪吉的子孫。

en: After the death of Hezron, Caleb went in to Ephrathah, the wife of Hezron his father, and she bore him Ashhur, the father of Tekoa.
zh: 希斯崙在迦勒．以法他死後，他的妻子亞比雅給他生了亞施戶；亞施戶是提哥亞的父親。

en: The sons of Jerahmeel, the firstborn of Hezron: Ram, his firstborn, Bunah, Oren, Ozem, and Ahijah.
zh: 希斯崙的長子耶拉篾的兒子是長子蘭、布拿、阿連、阿鮮和亞希雅。

en: Jerahmeel also had another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.
zh: 耶拉篾另有一個妻子，名叫亞他拉，是阿南的母親。

en: The sons of Ram, the firstborn of Jerahmeel: Maaz, Jamin, and Eker.
zh: 耶拉篾的長子蘭的兒子是瑪斯、雅憫和以結。

en: The sons of Onam: Shammai and Jada. The sons of Shammai: Nadab and Abishur.
zh: 阿南的兒子是沙買和雅大；沙買的兒子是拿答和亞比述。

en: The name of Abishur's wife was Abihail, and she bore him Ahban and Molid.
zh: 亞比述的妻子名叫亞比孩；亞比孩給他生了亞辦和摩利。

en: The sons of Nadab: Seled and Appaim; and Seled died childless.
zh: 拿答的兒子是西列和亞遍；西列死了，沒有兒子。

en: The son of Appaim: Ishi. The son of Ishi: Sheshan. The son of Sheshan: Ahlai.
zh: 亞遍的兒子是以示；以示的兒子是示珊；示珊的兒子是亞來。

en: The sons of Jada, Shammai's brother: Jether and Jonathan; and Jether died childless.
zh: 沙買的兄弟雅大的兒子是益帖和約拿單；益帖死了，沒有兒子。

en: The sons of Jonathan: Peleth and Zaza. These were the descendants of Jerahmeel.
zh: 約拿單的兒子是比勒和撒薩。以上這些人都是耶拉篾的子孫。

en: Now Sheshan had no sons, only daughters, but Sheshan had an Egyptian slave whose name was Jarha.
zh: 示珊沒有兒子，只有女兒；示珊有一僕人，是埃及人，名叫耶哈。

en: So Sheshan gave his daughter in marriage to Jarha his slave, and she bore him Attai.
zh: 示珊把女兒嫁給僕人耶哈作妻子，她給耶哈生了亞太。

en: Attai fathered Nathan, and Nathan fathered Zabad.
zh: 亞太生拿單；拿單生撒拔。

en: Zabad fathered Ephlal, and Ephlal fathered Obed.
zh: 撒拔生以弗拉；以弗拉生俄備得。

en: Obed fathered Jehu, and Jehu fathered Azariah.
zh: 俄備得生耶戶；耶戶生亞撒利雅。

en: Azariah fathered Helez, and Helez fathered Eleasah.
zh: 亞撒利雅生希利斯；希利斯生以利亞薩。

en: Eleasah fathered Sismai, and Sismai fathered Shallum.
zh: 以利亞薩生西斯買；西斯買生沙龍。

en: Shallum fathered Jekamiah, and Jekamiah fathered Elishama.
zh: 沙龍生耶加米雅；耶加米雅生以利沙瑪。

en: The sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel: Mareshah his firstborn, who fathered Ziph. The son of Mareshah: Hebron.
zh: 耶拉篾的兄弟迦勒的子孫如下：他的長子是米沙，是西弗的父親；他的兒子是瑪利沙，是希伯崙的父親。

en: The sons of Hebron: Korah, Tappuah, Rekem and Shema.
zh: 希伯崙的兒子是可拉、他普亞、利肯和示瑪。

en: Shema fathered Raham, the father of Jorkeam; and Rekem fathered Shammai.
zh: 示瑪生拉含，是約干的父親；利肯生沙買。

en: The son of Shammai: Maon; and Maon fathered Beth-zur.
zh: 沙買的兒子是瑪雲；瑪雲是伯．夙的父親。

en: Ephah also, Caleb's concubine, bore Haran, Moza, and Gazez; and Haran fathered Gazez.
zh: 迦勒的妾以法生哈蘭、摩撒和迦謝；哈蘭生迦卸。

en: The sons of Jahdai: Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Ephah, and Shaaph.
zh: 雅代的兒子是利健、約坦、基珊、毘力、以法和沙亞弗。

en: Maacah, Caleb's concubine, bore Sheber and Tirhanah.
zh: 迦勒的妾瑪迦生示別和特哈拿；

en: She also bore Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah and the father of Gibea; and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
zh: 又生麥瑪拿的父親沙亞弗、抹比拿的父親和基比亞的父親示法。迦勒的女兒是押撒。

en: These were the descendants of Caleb. The sons of Hur the firstborn of Ephrathah: Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim,
zh: 以上這些人是迦勒的子孫。以法他的長子戶珥的兒子是基列．耶琳的父親朔巴、

en: Salma, the father of Bethlehem, and Hareph the father of Beth-gader.
zh: 伯利恆的父親薩瑪、伯迦得的父親哈勒。

en: Shobal the father of Kiriath-jearim had other sons: Haroeh, half of the Menuhoth.
zh: 基列．耶琳的父親朔巴的子孫是哈羅以，以及半數米努．哈人。

en: And the clans of Kiriath-jearim: the Ithrites, the Puthites, the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; from these came the Zorathites and the Eshtaolites.
zh: 基列．耶琳的眾家族是以帖人、布特人、舒瑪人、密來人；從這些家族中又生出瑣拉人和以實陶人。

en: The sons of Salma: Bethlehem, the Netophathites, Atroth-beth-joab and half of the Manahathites, the Zorites.
zh: 薩瑪的子孫是伯利恆人、尼陀法人、亞他綠．伯．約押人、半數瑪拿哈人、瑣利人；

en: The clans also of the scribes who lived at Jabez: the Tirathites, the Shimeathites and the Sucathites. These are the Kenites who came from Hammath, the father of the house of Rechab.
zh: 住在雅比斯的經學家的眾家族，有特拉人、示米押人和蘇甲人。他們都是基尼人，是利甲家的祖先哈末的後代。
